creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
On Sat, 4 Jun 2011 10:00:41 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/py-mercurialserver,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/157595 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/157595
> 

I approve patch, however this needs /usr/ports/GIDs and /usr/ports/UIDs
to be patched as well. 

Hmm. Why it wasn't patched in the first place, when I submitted this
port?

I propose attached GIDs and UIDs patches
-- 
Aldis Berjoza
  http://www.bsdroot.lv/
